title: Referencing file name in the formula column
excerpt:
Is there a way to write a formula that queries the name of a file in the file column? 
Here’s what I’m trying to do: 

IF(AND({Name} = {guid},SEARCH({Name}, {File}, 1) > 0), “:green_circle:”, “:red_circle:”) 

name,guid,…

posts.author: ebannister (Elliot Bannister)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to write a formula that queries the name of a file in the file column?

Here’s what I’m trying to do:

IF(AND({Name} = {guid},SEARCH({Name}, {File}, 1) > 0), “”, “”)

name,guid,file
dog,dog,dog.jpg
cat,cat,bird.jpg

The first row would return ; the second should give .

posts.author: garethflower (Gareth Flower)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Elliot. Did you ever get this to work?

posts.author: ebannister (Elliot Bannister)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t think I did. I could query basic text columns but not file names within a file column. So I just had to get into the habit of manually checking file names before uploading them! Not ideal.
